title: COMMAND INFO
description: Returns information about one, multiple or all commands.
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of commands to look up

params.description: Array of command names to get information about
params.name: commands

content:
Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands. Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands get returned. If you request details about non-existing commands, their return position will be nil. ## Examples {{% redis-cli %}} COMMAND INFO get set eval COMMAND INFO foo evalsha config bar {{% /redis-cli %}} ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="command-info-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details. -tab-sep- [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details. {{< /multitabs >}}
example:
COMMAND INFO get set eval
COMMAND INFO foo evalsha config bar
intro:
Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands.

Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands
get returned.

If you request details about non-existing commands, their return
position will be nil.

Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands.

Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands
get returned.

If you request details about non-existing commands, their return
position will be nil.
